about.coverage.desc: We currently serve businesses across Western and Northern Europe, with on-site capture available in select cities.
about.coverage.heading: Where we operate
about.cta.desc: Whether you run a restaurant, hotel, or retail brand — we’ll turn your physical products into stunning 3D experiences.
about.cta.heading: Let’s bring your products to life
about.hero.subtitle: We are a managed 3D capture service. Our team handles everything — from on-site photography to web-ready 3D models with AR delivery — so businesses can focus on what they do best.
about.journey.desc: We started with a simple belief: 3D should be as accessible as photography. Here’s how we’re making that happen.
about.journey.heading: From idea to impact
about.journey.m1.desc: Started with a mission to make 3D accessible for every restaurant and retailer in Europe.
about.journey.m1.title: Founded
about.journey.m2.desc: Partnered with restaurant groups in Paris, hotel chains in Athens, and artisan markets in Tallinn.
about.journey.m2.title: First Clients
about.journey.m3.desc: Launched our full 3D Empyre platform with AR delivery, QR menus, and customer portal.
about.journey.m3.title: Platform Launch
about.journey.m4.desc: Growing across Europe with new capture technologies and enterprise-grade features.
about.journey.m4.title: Expanding
about.seo.desc: We are a managed 3D capture service turning physical products into digital experiences for restaurants, hotels, and retailers across Europe.
about.seo.title: About Us
about.values.desc: Every decision we make is guided by these principles. They define the quality of our work and the trust our clients place in us.
about.values.heading: What drives us
about.values.v1.desc: Every 3D model we deliver meets the highest standard. We reject shortcuts and invest in the best capture technology available.
about.values.v1.title: Quality Above All
about.values.v2.desc: From texture fidelity to load speed, we sweat the details that make the difference between good and extraordinary.
about.values.v2.title: Obsessive Attention to Detail
about.values.v3.desc: We adopt cutting-edge capture methods — photogrammetry, 3D Gaussian Splatting, AI-assisted modelling — before they become mainstream.
about.values.v3.title: Technology Leadership
about.values.v4.desc: SOC 2 Compliant. GDPR Ready. Your data is encrypted, your assets are protected, and your business stays secure.
about.values.v4.title: Trust & Security
about.values.v5.desc: Most projects go live in under 10 days. We move fast because our pipeline is purpose-built for efficiency — not because we cut corners.
about.values.v5.title: Speed Without Compromise
about.values.v6.desc: Headquartered in Europe, serving restaurants, hotels, and retailers across the continent — with plans to expand globally.
about.values.v6.title: European First, Global Reach

capture.criticalWarning: Complete all critical items (marked with !) before starting capture to ensure quality results.
capture.crossPolDesc: Pass 1: Cross-polarized (CPL at 90° to light polarizers) captures pure diffuse albedo. Pass 2: Normal (no filters) captures specular/roughness info. The difference map generates roughness textures.
caseStudies.cta.desc: Join restaurants, hotels, and retailers across Europe who are turning physical products into digital revenue.
caseStudies.cta.heading: Ready to see results like these?
caseStudies.hero.subtitle: See how restaurants, hotels, and retailers are using our managed 3D capture service to drive measurable business outcomes.
caseStudies.seo.desc: See how restaurants, hotels, and retailers are using 3D capture to increase conversions, reduce costs, and delight customers. Real results from real businesses.
caseStudies.seo.title: Case Studies
caseStudies.study1.challenge: A multi-location restaurant group needed to modernise their digital ordering experience. Static food photography wasn’t driving engagement and customers frequently returned dishes that didn’t match expectations.
caseStudies.study1.quote: Guests interact with the food before they order — it makes a real difference.
caseStudies.study1.result1.label: Online ordering conversion
caseStudies.study1.result2.label: Average dessert orders
caseStudies.study1.result3.label: To full ROI
caseStudies.study1.solution: We captured 48 signature dishes across 3 locations in a single week. Each item was processed into a photorealistic 3D model, integrated into their digital menus with AR preview via QR codes on every table.
caseStudies.study1.timeline: 5 days capture → 3 days processing → Live in 10 days
caseStudies.study2.challenge: A boutique hotel chain was spending heavily on seasonal photo shoots to showcase rooms and amenities. The imagery felt flat and failed to convey the spatial character that set their properties apart.
caseStudies.study2.quote: Guests now book the room they actually want. No surprises, no complaints.
caseStudies.study2.result1.label: Direct bookings increase
caseStudies.study2.result2.label: Photo shoot costs reduced
caseStudies.study2.result3.label: Longer time on listing pages
caseStudies.study2.solution: We created interactive 3D tours of premium suites and captured key amenities — pools, restaurants, spas — as explorable 3D scenes. Assets were embedded directly into their booking flow.
caseStudies.study2.timeline: 3 days on-site → 5 days processing → Live in 9 days
caseStudies.study3.challenge: An artisan food market with 200+ handcrafted products needed their online store to convey the same tactile, premium quality that customers experience in person. Flat product photos weren’t cutting it.
caseStudies.study3.quote: Customers say they feel like they’re holding the product. That’s exactly what we wanted.
caseStudies.study3.result1.label: Time spent on product pages
caseStudies.study3.result2.label: Online sales increase
caseStudies.study3.result3.label: Product return rate
caseStudies.study3.solution: We scanned their top 80 products using photogrammetry, delivering web-optimised 3D models with AR viewing. Each product page features a 360° viewer alongside nutritional and origin details.
caseStudies.study3.timeline: 2 days capture → 4 days processing → Live in 8 days
caseStudies.summary.stat1.label: Avg. sales increase
caseStudies.summary.stat2.label: Avg. time to live
caseStudies.summary.stat3.label: Avg. content costs
caseStudies.summary.stat4.label: Avg. time to ROI

compare.approaches.diy.desc: Use consumer apps like Polycam or Luma AI on your phone. You handle the scanning, processing, hosting, and embedding yourself.

compare.approaches.managed.desc: We handle everything. Our team captures your objects on-site, processes them into web-ready 3D models, and delivers AR-ready assets with hosting, QR codes, and analytics.
compare.approaches.managed.title: Managed 3D Capture
compare.approaches.none.desc: Flat 2D images. No interactivity, no AR, no spatial context. The status quo that most businesses are still using today.
compare.approaches.none.title: Traditional Photography

home.badge: Now serving EU — Estonia · Greece · France
home.brandStory.heading: Why
home.brandStory.p1: Empyre is Empire reimagined. We're building an empire of photorealistic digital twins — capturing the physical world, one object at a time, and making it interactive for everyone.
home.brandStory.p2: The unconventional 'y' reflects our approach: bold, modern, and unapologetically different. Just like the 3D experiences we create.
home.beforeAfter.caption: Drag the handle to compare · Restaurants using 3D menus see 35% higher conversion
home.beforeAfter.desc: Drag the slider to see the difference. Your customers see products from every angle, in AR, on their own table.
home.beforeAfter.heading: From flat photo to
home.capabilities.ai-processing.desc: AI-powered texture upscaling, mesh optimization, and automatic cleanup — turning raw photogrammetry scans into polished, production-ready models.
home.capabilities.ai-processing.title: AI-Enhanced Processing
home.capabilities.analytics.desc: Track views, engagement time, AR launches, and conversion rates per asset. Know exactly how customers interact with your 3D content.
home.capabilities.analytics.title: Real-Time Analytics
home.capabilities.api-webhooks.desc: RESTful API, webhook events, and iframe embeds for seamless integration into your existing tech stack and workflows.
home.capabilities.api-webhooks.title: API & Webhooks
home.capabilities.configurator.desc: Let customers swap colors, materials, and product variants interactively in 3D — boosting engagement and reducing returns.
home.capabilities.configurator.title: 3D Product Configurator
home.capabilities.desc: Built on cutting-edge capture technology and AI, our platform delivers everything you need to create, manage, and publish interactive 3D experiences at scale.
home.capabilities.gaussian-splatting.des: Next-generation radiance field capture for ultra-realistic scenes. Photorealistic quality that traditional meshes can't match.
home.capabilities.global-cdn.desc: Assets delivered via edge nodes worldwide for sub-second load times. Optimized streaming ensures smooth performance on any device.
home.capabilities.global-cdn.title: Global CDN Delivery
home.capabilities.heading: Enterprise-grade
home.capabilities.multi-format.desc: Export to GLB, GLTF, USDZ, OBJ, FBX, and STL — ready for web, mobile, AR, game engines, and print-on-demand.
home.capabilities.multi-format.title: Multi-Format Export
home.capabilities.web-ar.desc: Embed interactive 3D viewers on any website with one line of code. Native AR on iOS and Android — no app needed.
home.capabilities.web-ar.title: Web & AR Delivery
home.demo.desc: This is exactly what your customers see. Rotate, zoom, and tap AR to place the model on your table.
home.demo.feature1.desc: Customers explore products from every angle. Touch, drag, and pinch — it works on every device.
home.demo.feature1.title: 360° Interaction
home.demo.feature2.desc: Tap the AR icon on mobile to place the model in your real space. No app download needed.
home.demo.feature2.title: AR Preview
home.demo.feature3.desc: One line of embed code for any website — Shopify, WordPress, or custom. Under 50 KB initial load.
home.demo.feature3.title: Embeddable
home.demo.heading: Try our
home.faq.a1: We handle everything from logistics to processing. You simply request a capture, our team comes to your location (or you ship items to us), we scan your objects, and deliver web-ready 3D models within days.
home.faq.a2: We provide high-fidelity, photorealistic 3D models optimized for web and AR. Our pipelines use advanced photogrammetry and laser scanning to ensure sub-millimeter accuracy and realistic textures.
home.faq.a3: No app required! Our 3D viewer runs directly in any modern web browser. For AR experiences on mobile, it uses native iOS (QuickLook) and Android (Scene Viewer) capabilities.
home.faq.a4: Yes, we provide a simple embed code (iframe) or a React component that you can drop into any website. It works with Shopify, WordPress, Squarespace, and custom stacks.
home.faq.heading: Common questions
home.faq.moreLink: See more FAQs on our Pricing page →
home.faq.q1: How does the capture process work?
home.faq.q2: What is the quality of the 3D models?
home.faq.q3: Do I need an app to view the models?
home.faq.q4: Can I integrate this into my existing website?
home.hero.subtitle: We come to your location, capture your objects, and deliver production-ready 3D & AR assets in under a week. No equipment. No expertise needed.
home.howItWorks.desc: We manage every step — no learning curve, no equipment, no risk. You get production-ready 3D in days.

howItWorks.cta.desc: Submit a capture request — we’ll confirm within 2 hours. No credit card required.
howItWorks.cta.heading: Ready to get started?
howItWorks.hero.subtitle: From your first request to live, embeddable 3D assets — we handle every step. No equipment, no expertise, no risk on your end.
howItWorks.includes.heading: Every project includes
howItWorks.library.desc: List your commissioned models on our public marketplace. You keep 50% of every sale — we handle the rest.
howItWorks.library.heading: Earn from your 3D models
howItWorks.seo.desc: From your first request to live 3D assets in 8 days. Learn how our 3D Empyre process works — no equipment or expertise needed.
howItWorks.seo.title: How It Works
howItWorks.timeline.desc: A typical project ships in 8 business days. Complex or high-volume batches are scheduled with a custom timeline.
howItWorks.timeline.heading: Day-by-day timeline
howItWorks.timeline.step1.desc: Fill out our intake form with object details, logistics preferences, and delivery goals. A dedicated project coordinator confirms within 2 hours.
howItWorks.timeline.step1.label: Submit Request
howItWorks.timeline.step2.desc: We coordinate on-site access (or shipping logistics), prepare our specialist equipment, and assign the right capture crew for your vertical.
howItWorks.timeline.step2.label: Scheduling & Prep
howItWorks.timeline.step3.desc: Our expert team arrives, sets up a calibrated studio environment, and captures your objects using photogrammetry and/or structured-light scanning.
howItWorks.timeline.step3.label: On-Site Capture
howItWorks.timeline.step4.desc: Raw scan data is processed into optimized GLB/USDZ files. Our QA approvers review geometry, textures, and AR compatibility before sign-off.
howItWorks.timeline.step4.label: Processing & QA
howItWorks.timeline.step5.desc: Finished assets are delivered to your portal. Grab embeddable links, QR codes, or download GLB/USDZ bundles — ready for your website, app, or campaign.
howItWorks.timeline.step5.label: Delivery & Go Live
industry.faq1.a: On-site capture typically takes 1–2 hours per 10 objects. Processing and QA take 3–5 business days.
industry.faq2.a: Yes, items should be clean and staged. For reflective items, our team will bring specialized scanning sprays if permitted.
industry.faq2.q: Do I need to prepare the objects?
industry.hospitality.faq1.a: Minimal disruption. We schedule captures during low-occupancy periods and work quietly. Each room takes about 20-30 minutes to scan.
industry.hospitality.faq1.q: How disruptive is the capture process for hotel guests?
industry.hospitality.faq2.a: Yes. Our team uses specialized outdoor scanning techniques. We recommend overcast days for best results, but can work in any conditions.
industry.hospitality.faq2.q: Can you capture outdoor amenities like pools and gardens?
industry.interactiveViewerDesc: Customers can rotate, zoom, and explore every detail.
industry.realEstate.faq1.a: No hard limit. We've captured everything from studio apartments to 500m² commercial spaces. Larger properties may require multi-day sessions.
industry.realEstate.faq1.q: Is there a limit on property size?
industry.realEstate.faq2.a: Yes. We capture full interior walkthroughs plus exterior facades, gardens, and terraces. Drone capture for aerial views is available as an add-on.
industry.realEstate.faq2.q: Can you capture both interior and exterior?
industry.retail.faq1.a: Anything from a ring to a refrigerator. Small items (under 30cm) ship to our studio; larger items are captured on-site.
industry.retail.faq1.q: What product sizes can you capture?
industry.retail.faq2.a: Standard turnaround is 3-5 business days per batch. Rush delivery (24-48h) is available for an additional 30% fee.
industry.retail.faq2.q: How long until I get the 3D models?
industry.sampleBrowse: Browse real assets captured for {{id}} clients — rotate, zoom, and explore every detail.
industry.teamCanDoDesc: We manage the capture, you control the distribution. Our portal gives you specific permissions tailored to the {{id}} workflow.

pricing.capture.complex.desc: Reflective, transparent, high detail, or complex geometry. Includes extra retouching, QC passes, and multi-angle refinement.
pricing.capture.complex.title: Complex object
pricing.capture.heading: One-time, per-item pricing
pricing.capture.onsite.label: Onsite day rate
pricing.capture.rush.label: Rush turnaround
pricing.capture.rush.note: per item (or a fixed rush fee)
pricing.capture.standard.desc: Diffuse surfaces, normal geometry. Includes capture, cleanup, optimization, publish to product page, and QR generation.
pricing.capture.standard.title: Standard object
pricing.capture.subtitle: We capture, process, and publish your physical objects as web-ready 3D & AR experiences — QR generated and ready to embed.
pricing.cta.description: Enterprise covers 5,000+ active items, SSO, dedicated infrastructure, multi-region hosting, compliance, and bespoke SLA.
pricing.cta.heading: Need a custom solution?
pricing.examples.heading: What will my invoice look like?
pricing.faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
pricing.faq.q1.answer: 1 view = one session load of an AR/3D experience. We count once per device per 30 minutes per experience, even if the page is refreshed. Known bots, uptime monitors, and your internal QA traffic (IP allowlist / token flagging) are excluded.
pricing.faq.q1.question: What counts as a view?
pricing.faq.q2.answer: Never. There are no hard caps. If you exceed your plan's included views, overage views are billed in arrears at your plan's per-1,000 rate on the same invoice. Your experience stays live.
pricing.faq.q2.question: Do you stop service if I exceed my included views?
pricing.faq.q3.answer: You can set budget alerts in the dashboard. The service continues even if an alert threshold is reached — we never interrupt your customer experiences mid-month. Prepaid View Credit Packs are also available if you want fully predictable invoicing.
pricing.faq.q3.question: Can I cap my spend to avoid surprises?
pricing.faq.q4.answer: Your staff (with a team seat) can publish, update, and manage experiences. Your customers can only view or interact with content you have shared with them — they cannot modify it.
pricing.faq.q4.question: Who can publish and edit experiences?
pricing.faq.q5.answer: Yes. Plan changes are prorated and take effect at the start of your next billing cycle. Contact support or change directly from your dashboard.
pricing.faq.q5.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
pricing.faq.q6.answer: Credit Packs are prepaid view credits you can purchase at any time. Credits draw down before overage kicks in, keeping invoices predictable. Credits are valid for 12 months and shared across all experiences in your account.
pricing.faq.q6.question: What are View Credit Packs?
pricing.faq.q7.answer: Standard (€290) covers most objects with diffuse surfaces and normal geometry. Complex (€490) is for reflective, transparent, or high-detail objects that require extra retouching and QC passes. If you're unsure, send us a photo and we'll advise.
pricing.faq.q7.question: What is the difference between Standard and Complex capture?
pricing.hero.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.hero.subtitle: A platform subscription for hosting and AR delivery, plus optional 3D Empyre to get your objects 3D-ready — handled by our team.
pricing.onsite.heading: We come to you
pricing.onsite.s1.desc: High-accuracy 3D models captured from physical objects using multi-image photogrammetry. Web-ready, AR-ready, QR-linked.
pricing.onsite.s1.title: Photogrammetry & 3D modelling
pricing.onsite.s2.desc: Cinematic 4K product and space videos shot during the same visit. Colour-graded, edited, and delivered in short-form and long-form cuts.
pricing.onsite.s2.title: Video production
pricing.onsite.s3.desc: Full-room or full-space immersive walkthroughs. Ideal for showrooms, hotels, retail spaces, and venues.
pricing.onsite.s3.title: 360° & virtual tour capture
pricing.onsite.s4.desc: Point-cloud and high-detail spatial scans for interiors, buildings, and construction sites. BIM-compatible output on request.
pricing.onsite.s4.title: Architectural & spatial scanning
pricing.onsite.setup.detail: — equipment setup, lighting, and quality control are handled by our specialist on every visit.
pricing.onsite.subtitle: Our team travels to your location and handles everything — from photogrammetry 3D capture to video, 360° tours, and spatial scanning, all in a single visit.

pricing.plans.subtitle: Recurring subscription — billed monthly or annually. No hard view caps; overages are billed per view at the end of each cycle.

pricing.seo.description: Simple, transparent pricing for 3D hosting, AR delivery, and 3D Empyre services. Plans from €59/month.

pricing.views.heading: How views are counted
pricing.views.v1.body: Counted once per device, per experience, per 30-minute window — even if the page is refreshed.
pricing.views.v1.title: 1 view = 1 session load
pricing.views.v2.body: Included views reset on your billing date. Unused included views do not roll over (credits are separate).
pricing.views.v2.title: Monthly reset
pricing.views.v3.body: Known crawlers, uptime monitors, and your QA traffic (IP allowlist / token flagging) are never billed.
pricing.views.v3.title: Bots & QA excluded
pricing.views.v4.body: Subscription billed in advance. Overage views appear on the same invoice at the end of the cycle.
pricing.views.v4.title: Overage billed in arrears
pricing.views.v5.body: See total, billable, excluded, and remaining included views — plus a projected bill — in real time.
pricing.views.v5.title: Full dashboard visibility
pricing.views.v6.body: Large monthly overages attract automatic discounts: next 1M views −10%, next 3M −20%, above that negotiated.
pricing.views.v6.title: Volume overage discounts
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.lastUpdated: Last updated: February 15, 2026. If you have questions or comments about this policy, you may email us at privacy@3dempyre.com.
privacy.section1.body: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you register on the Services, express an interest in obtaining information about us or our products and services, when you participate in activities on the Services, or otherwise when you contact us.
privacy.section1.item1: Names and Contact Data (email addresses, phone numbers)
privacy.section1.item2: Credentials (passwords, hints, and similar security information)
privacy.section1.item3: Payment Data (stored securely by our payment processor)
privacy.section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
privacy.section2.body: We use personal information collected via our Services for a variety of business purposes described below. We process your personal information for these purposes in reliance on our legitimate business interests, in order to enter into or perform a contract with you, with your consent, and/or for compliance with our legal obligations.
privacy.section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
privacy.section3.body: We only share information with your consent, to comply with laws, to provide you with services, to protect your rights, or to fulfill business obligations. We may process or share your data that we hold based on the following legal basis: Consent, Legitimate Interests, Performance of a Contract, or Legal Obligations.
privacy.section3.title: 3. How We Share Your Information
privacy.seo.description: Our commitment to protecting your privacy.
privacy.seo.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy.

restPricing.addons.desc: Available on any plan. Each add-on has a one-time setup fee and an ongoing monthly fee.
restPricing.addons.extraStorageDetail: +10 GB per menu · hosted 3D models & textures
restPricing.addons.heading: Extend your menu
restPricing.cta.desc: Start with a plan and schedule your first on-site capture session.
restPricing.cta.heading: Ready to bring your menu to life?
restPricing.faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
restPricing.faq.q1.answer: 1 view = one session load of a 3D item. We count once per device, per item, per 30 minutes — so refreshing within 30 minutes counts as 1 view. Opening a different item counts as a new view. Bots, crawlers, and your internal QA traffic are excluded.
restPricing.faq.q1.question: What counts as a view?
restPricing.faq.q2.answer: Never. Overage views are billed monthly using a tiered ladder starting at the first view beyond your included allowance. Your menu stays live.
restPricing.faq.q2.question: Do you stop service if I exceed my included views?
restPricing.faq.q3.answer: We send our team to your restaurant. Each visit has a flat €100 fee covering travel and setup, then €20 per 3D model captured. The model quality (A, B, or C) is determined by your plan. Models are published to your menu within 48 hours.
restPricing.faq.q3.question: How does on-site 3D capture work?
restPricing.faq.q4.answer: Level A (Standard) produces clean, web-ready models suitable for most dishes. Level B (Pro) adds extra detail passes for a sharper, more realistic result. Level C (Ultra) uses our full production pipeline — maximum texture resolution, multi-angle refinement, and premium retouching — ideal for signature dishes.
restPricing.faq.q4.question: What is the difference between quality levels A, B, and C?
restPricing.faq.q5.answer: Yes. Plan changes are prorated and take effect at the start of your next billing cycle. Models already captured are not affected by a plan change.
restPricing.faq.q5.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
restPricing.faq.q6.answer: Storage counts the 3D models and textures for your menu. If you exceed your plan's included storage, you can add a €10/month block for an additional +10 GB at any time.
restPricing.faq.q6.question: How does storage work?
restPricing.faq.q7.answer: Yes. All add-ons can be purchased at any time. There is a one-time setup fee to enable the feature on your menu, plus a small ongoing monthly fee to keep it active.
restPricing.faq.q7.question: Can I add features like allergens or AR after I start?
restPricing.hero.heading: 3D menus for restaurants
restPricing.hero.subtitle: Per-menu subscription. Unlimited 3D items within your storage. No hard view caps — overages billed by usage. On-site capture available.
restPricing.overage.desc: Overage views beyond your included allowance are billed monthly using the tiered ladder below. Service never stops.
restPricing.overage.heading: No hard caps — billed by usage
restPricing.plans.desc: All plans include unlimited 3D items (within storage), a QR code per item, printable QR sheets, and basic analytics.
restPricing.plans.heading: Per-menu subscription
restPricing.plans.pro.name: Pro
restPricing.plans.standard.name: Standard
restPricing.plans.ultra.name: Ultra
restPricing.production.desc: We come to your restaurant and capture every dish you need. This pricing applies exclusively to restaurants. One-time per item, billed separately from the subscription.

restPricing.production.ex3.label: 40 models

restPricing.production.qualityNote: Model quality is determined by your subscription plan (Standard = Level A · Pro = Level B · Ultra = Level C).
restPricing.production.visitDesc: Covers travel, equipment, and our capture specialist. Applied once per visit.

restPricing.quality.a.name: Optimized
restPricing.quality.b.desc: Extra detail passes for a sharper, more realistic result. Great for featured dishes and regular menus.
restPricing.quality.b.name: High
restPricing.quality.c.desc: Maximum texture resolution, multi-angle refinement, and premium retouching. Ideal for signature dishes.
restPricing.quality.c.name: Premium
restPricing.quality.heading: What you get

restPricing.schema.name: Restaurant 3D Menu
restPricing.seo.desc: Per-menu 3D subscription plans for restaurants. From €18/month per menu. On-site capture, AR menus, QR codes included.
restPricing.seo.title: Restaurant Pricing

restPricing.viewDef.t2.body: Known crawlers, uptime monitors, and your internal QA traffic are never billed.

revenue.title: Revenue Overview
roadmap.cta.desc: Our roadmap is driven by restaurant owners. If there's a tool that would make a real difference to your business, we want to hear it.
roadmap.cta.heading: Have a feature request?
roadmap.cta.label: Shape what we build
roadmap.hero.heading: The future of
roadmap.hero.subtitle: Four phases. Dozens of features. Every single one built exclusively for restaurants.
roadmap.phase01.feat1.desc: On-site professional photography converted into web-ready 3D/GLB assets — optimised for fast loading on any device.
roadmap.phase01.feat1.title: 3D Food Capture
roadmap.phase01.feat2.desc: Customers scan a QR code and instantly see any dish at real-world scale, directly on their table — no app required.
roadmap.phase01.feat2.title: Interactive AR Dish Viewer
roadmap.phase01.feat3.desc: Manage all your capture projects, review delivered assets, approve or request revisions, and share links — in one place.
roadmap.phase01.feat3.title: Restaurant Owner Portal
roadmap.phase01.feat4.desc: Vetted capture professionals operating across Estonia, Greece & France — with consistent quality and fast turnaround.
roadmap.phase01.feat4.title: Photographer Network
roadmap.phase01.headline: Foundation
roadmap.phase01.sub: The core platform is live — restaurants can capture, deliver, and showcase 3D dish assets today.
roadmap.phase02.feat1.desc: Automatic detection of blurry, poorly-lit, or incomplete captures — flagged before delivery so you never receive a subpar asset.
roadmap.phase02.feat1.title: AI Quality Control
roadmap.phase02.feat2.desc: Track dish view counts, AR opens, QR scans, and conversion rates per item — so you know which dishes are driving the most interest.
roadmap.phase02.feat2.title: Restaurant Analytics
roadmap.phase02.feat3.desc: Connect with Square, Toast, and Lightspeed. When you update your menu, your 3D assets sync automatically — zero manual work.
roadmap.phase02.feat3.title: POS Integrations
roadmap.phase02.feat4.desc: Manage all your restaurant branches under a single organisation — separate asset libraries, unified billing and reporting.
roadmap.phase02.feat4.title: Multi-location Management
roadmap.phase02.headline: Intelligence
roadmap.phase02.sub: We’re adding smart tools to save time, surface insights, and connect your 3D assets to the rest of your restaurant stack.
roadmap.phase03.feat1.desc: Manage your entire asset library, approve capture jobs, and share AR previews directly from your phone — no browser needed.
roadmap.phase03.feat1.title: iOS & Android App
roadmap.phase03.feat2.desc: Drop one script tag onto your website and your dishes appear as interactive 3D models — no developer experience required.
roadmap.phase03.feat2.title: Embeddable 3D Widget
roadmap.phase03.feat3.desc: Book a single session and capture your entire menu in one go — our team handles the scheduling, logistics, and delivery.
roadmap.phase03.feat3.title: Bulk Menu Campaigns
roadmap.phase03.feat4.desc: Automatically translate dish names, descriptions, and allergen labels into the local language of each market you serve.
roadmap.phase03.feat4.title: Multi-language Menus
roadmap.phase03.headline: Reach
roadmap.phase03.sub: Put your 3D assets everywhere your customers are — your app, your website, your whole menu.
roadmap.phase04.feat1.desc: Expanding our professional capture network to Spain, Italy, Germany, and the Netherlands — more cities, same quality standard.
roadmap.phase04.feat1.title: EU Geographic Expansion
roadmap.phase04.feat2.desc: A full REST API for franchises managing 10+ locations — programmatic asset management, webhooks, and bulk operations.
roadmap.phase04.feat2.title: Restaurant Chain API
roadmap.phase04.feat3.desc: Display your 3D dish assets on in-restaurant screens and kiosks — loop animations, seasonal specials, and real-time updates.
roadmap.phase04.feat3.title: Digital Menu Board Integration
roadmap.phase04.feat4.desc: Auto-tag common allergens and nutritional information directly on 3D dish assets — one-click compliance with EU labelling rules.
roadmap.phase04.feat4.title: Allergen & Nutrition Overlays
roadmap.phase04.headline: Scale
roadmap.phase04.sub: Enterprise-grade tools and geographic expansion — built for restaurant groups, chains, and franchises operating across Europe.
roadmap.seo.desc: See what we're building next for restaurants — four phases of features, tools, and expansion.
roadmap.seo.title: Roadmap
roi.calculator.adjustValues: Adjust the values to match your business
roi.calculator.disclaimer: Based on a typical 3D investment of {{amount}}. Conversion lift and cost reduction figures are based on industry averages.
roi.cta.desc: Get a personalized ROI analysis from our team.
roi.cta.heading: Ready to see these results?
roi.hero.heading: Calculate Your
roi.hero.subtitle: See how interactive 3D experiences can increase engagement, boost orders, and pay for themselves.
roi.methodology.conversion.desc: Interactive experiences drive 32% more orders on average. Customers who interact with 3D models convert at significantly higher rates.
roi.methodology.conversion.title: Conversion Lift
roi.methodology.cost.desc: Eliminate recurring photography costs with evergreen 3D assets that never go out of date. Update digitally instead of re-shooting.
roi.methodology.cost.title: Cost Reduction
roi.methodology.desc: Our projections are grounded in peer-reviewed research and real-world performance data from 3D commerce deployments.
roi.methodology.engagement.desc: 3D models increase page dwell time by 2.5x compared to static images, giving customers more confidence in their purchase decisions.
roi.methodology.engagement.title: Engagement Boost
roi.methodology.heading: How we calculate your ROI
roi.results.disclaimer: Based on industry averages. Individual results may vary.
roi.results.heading: Projected Results
roi.results.subtitle: Updated live as you adjust inputs
roi.results.summaryPrefix: Based on your inputs, 3D interactive experiences could generate an additional
roi.results.summarySuffix: per month in revenue and savings.
roi.seo.desc: Calculate the return on investment of switching to 3D product photography and AR menus. See how interactive 3D experiences increase engagement and boost orders.
roi.seo.title: ROI Calculator

security.dataProtection.p1: We take the security of your data seriously. Our platform is built with security in mind from the ground up, utilizing industry-standard best practices to ensure your information remains safe.
security.dataProtection.p2: We employ continuous security monitoring, regular penetration testing, and automated vulnerability scanning to identify and address potential risks before they can affect our users.

security.subtitle: Security is at the core of everything we build.
security.vulnerability.body: If you believe you have found a security vulnerability in our platform, please contact our security team immediately at security@3dempyre.com. We operate a bug bounty program for responsible disclosure.

terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.section1.body: These Terms of Service constitute a legally binding agreement made between you, whether personally or on behalf of an entity ("you") and 3D Empyre ("we," "us" or "our"), concerning your access to and use of the 3dempyre.com website as well as any other media form, media channel, mobile website or mobile application related, linked, or otherwise connected thereto (collectively, the "Site").
terms.section1.title: 1. Agreement to Terms
terms.section2.body: Unless otherwise indicated, the Site is our proprietary property and all source code, databases, functionality, software, website designs, audio, video, text, photographs, and graphics on the Site (collectively, the "Content") and the trademarks, service marks, and logos contained therein (the "Marks") are owned or controlled by us or licensed to us, and are protected by copyright and trademark laws.
terms.section2.title: 2. Intellectual Property Rights
terms.section3.intro: By using the Site, you represent and warrant that:
terms.section3.item1: All registration information you submit will be true, accurate, current, and complete.
terms.section3.item2: You will maintain the accuracy of such information and promptly update such registration information as necessary.
terms.section3.item3: You have the legal capacity and you agree to comply with these Terms of Service.
